Biaya pembuatan dapat disesuaikan dengan jenis molding yang diinginkan.

name: Pabrik Pembuatan Injection Moulding, Blowing, Die Casting
description:
Fanrong Technic Global adalah perusahaan manufaktur yang terintegrasi bergerak di bidang plastic injection moulding, plastic blowing, dan die casting. Kami melayani produksi massal untuk berbagai jenis sparepart mesin, produk plastik industri, dan konsumen, serta menerima jasa perancangan teknik 3D dan machining presisi tinggi.
Mesin unggulan kami seperti manual milling, manual lathe (bubut), surface grinding, cnc milling, cnc lathe, edm machine, mesin injeksi plastik, mesin blowin, dan die casting

name: Tuffiadi Semesta
description:
PT. Tuffiadi Semesta berdiri di Jakarta sejak tahun 1976 (25 November 1976).
PT. Tuffiadi Semesta telah menjadi mitra kerja dengan banyak perusahaan di Indonesia baik dalam skala kecil, segang, maupun besar seperti : PT. Krakatau Steel, PT. Bridgestone, PT. Gunung Garuda Group, PT. Semen Batu Raja, PT. Bakrie Group, PT. Indah Kiat Pulp & Paper dan lain sebagainya.
Kami menggunakan mesin CNC yang dapat membuat berbagai produk seal melalui proses machining. Mesin CNC ini menghasilkan produk dengan akurasi yang tinggi sehingga memenuhi persyaratan untuk kebutuhan yang sangat spesifik maupun yang bersifat custom.

description: Since 1992, PT. Biggy Cemerlang has operated as a preferred plastic manufacturer across Indonesia. We are also a leading name in the globally competitive Fast Moving Consumer Goods industry (FMCG). With close to three decades of experience, we are committed to staying on-the-pulse of evolving technologies to keep our valued clients moving forward with high-quality, 100% pure virgin materials that are safe for human use. Our facilities are strategically located in the heart of Jakarta, with convenient access to the Soekarno Hatta International Airport and Tanjung Priok via the highway that connects the Jakarta Metropolitan Areas. We are committed to delivering products that bring the most advantages for our clients, making a positive impact.

name: PT Bojong Westplas(WESTPEX OFFICE)
description:
PT. Bojong Westplas berdiri pada tahun 1991. Perusahaan ini memproduksi bahan baku PVC Compounds, XLPE (Cross-Linked Polyethylene) dan PE Jacketing. Merupakan salah satu pelopor dalam pembuatan bahan XLPE (Cross-Linked Polyehtlene) untuk digunakan sebagai isolasi pada kabel bertegangan 1KV-10KV seperti kabel pada tiang listrik di sepanjang jalan.

Dengan latar belakang pengalaman lebih dari 10 tahun memproduksi material XLPE Compounds Silane Based yang merupakan bahan baku untuk pipa PEX-ALPEX ( Cross Linked Polytehylene-Alumunium-Cross Linked Polyethylene) dan pipa PE-Xb ( Cross-Linked Polyethylene ) yang menggunakan bahan baku silane. Kami adalah pelopor utama pembuatan pipa PEX di Indonesia.

description:
Honorich Plasindo is a plastic fabrication company with over 25 years of experience that specializes in custom thermoplastics injection production such as spareparts and pride in our skill in manufacturing quality products with complex specification, close tolerance and high standards that extends to the international market. Our experience with not only general grade thermoplastic resins but also engineering grade thermoplastic resins, such as ABS, Nylon (PA), Acetal (POM) to name a few. This makes us a staple in custom plastic fabrication molder industry.

We are your one stop solution, from mold design to consistently delivering high quality products with close tolerance.

Reach out to us and see how we can help you and your business.

Kami telah memiliki ratusan pelanggan setia yang tersebar di wilayah Sumatera, Jawa, Kalimantan dan Bali. Fokus kami adalah terus memperluas jaringan di seluruh Indonesia.

name: Indonesia Plastic Manufacturer & Exporter - Urban Plastic - PT. Urban Plastik Indonesia
description:
PT. Urban Plastik Indonesia is an Indonesian Plastic Manufacturer and Exporter.

We are a privately owned company with goals to manufacture high-quality plastics at competitive prices and to supply our customers with outstanding services.

The company is started by a salesman who sold plastic door to door. After a while, he bought a small plastic factory, and run together with his wife.

The company is now run by the second generation and grew and expanded the company even bigger.

Currently we sell diverse plastic products such as: Bin Bags, Soft Loop Bags, T Shirt Bags, Die Cut Handle Bags, Roll Bags, Geotextile Non Woven, Geotextile Woven, Geomembrane, Geobag, Mulch Plastic, Dead Body Bag, and other plastic packaging.
